commits.message: chore(CL-ugwe.7): add mcp migration debt audit scripts
chore(CL-ugwe.7): record mcp migration debt evidence
chore(CL-ugwe.7): refresh mcp migration debt evidence
fix(CL-ugwe.7): address codex adversarial findings in audit-mcp-migration-debt.py
chore(CL-ugwe.7): regenerate audit report with corrected classifier
chore(CL-ugwe.7): annotate top-5 mcp migration debt (bead CL-ugwe.7)

tests.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run --no-project python /Users/malte/.agents/skills/beads/scripts/implementation_artifacts.py validate --manifest .beads/runs/a65733fb-1895-447c-8469-fe3240ee168a/implementation_manifest.json --evidence .beads/runs/a65733fb-1895-447c-8469-fe3240ee168a/evidence_ledger.json --bead-id CL-ugwe.7

scope_changes: Phase 10 dispute resolution: AK2 was reopened after the verifier confirmed the sibling cognovis-core source files are writable from this run. The top five owning sources were annotated with minimal MCP migration notes (1-2 line comments each, no prose rewrites) and committed to ../cognovis-core (SHA 94b4f09). CL-4sdb remains as the broader follow-up tracker for the full migration.
downstream_impacts: The repo now contains a reproducible audit script for MCP migration debt on installed skill and agent surfaces.
The repo now contains a doctor-style wrapper that exits non-zero when A-class findings remain.
The committed audit report ranks the top five remediation targets and (post-classifier-fix regeneration) shows accurate A+B counts.
Follow-up bead CL-4sdb tracks the broader source-repo MCP migration; the top five sources are now annotated with explicit MCP migration markers so future implementers can find them.

Per Codex adversarial review fix: the classifier now (a) only downgrades to D when the negation marker is the primary intent of the line — lines containing both a negation marker and an explicit invocation recipe retain their A/B classification — and (b) no longer treats Markdown blockquote markers (>) or Markdown table pipes (|) as shell recipe indicators. The committed audit report at docs/audit/mcp-migration-debt-2026-05-29.md has been regenerated with the corrected classifier (commit dcb5032).
